prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan **VG30DETT** (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 300+ hp stock) with forged internals: JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 1000+ hp reliability. Pair with a **Garrett GTX4202R** turbo (88mm compressor, .96 A/R turbine housing) and a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate for precise boost control at 28-32 psi.

Full **HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold** (equal-length design for VG30DETT) with a **SARD 80mm titanium exhaust system** (dual 3.5" piping, straight-through mufflers) and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller for seamless turbo spool and minimal backpressure.

Custom **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with a **Nissan Consult-II to CAN bus adapter** for direct OEM sensor integration. Tune via **EcuTek ProECU** with a **VG30DETT-specific base map** (optimized for E85 fuel, 280cc **ID1000 injectors**, and a **Walbro 450 LPH** in-tank fuel pump). Add a **Nismo S130 intercooler** (front-mount, 12-row core) and a **GReddy Type-S intercooler water spray kit** for sustained power under 30+ psi boost.
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit** (F31-specific, bolt-on fenders with 3" extended arches) paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25** wheels (275/35/18 Toyo R888R tires) and **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (adjustable damping, 30mm drop).

**JUN Auto rear ducktail spoiler** (carbon fiber, F31-specific mounting points) and **C-West front lip splitter** (polyurethane, 3-piece design for aggressive rake). Full **Rocket Bunny-style side skirts** (custom-fabricated, 2" lower than OEM) with **Nismo S130 side markers** (LED, smoked lenses).

**Recaro SRD-II seats** (JDM-spec, fixed-back, 5-point harness compatibility) with **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses** and a **Nismo 350mm steering wheel** (suede, quick-release hub). Full **Voodoo13 carbon fiber interior trim kit** (dashboard, door cards, center console) and **Defi BF Advance gauges** (oil pressure, boost, EGT) mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod**.
